fields.name: Content Knowledge and Pedagogy
fields.description: Applies knowledge of content within and across curriculum teaching areas.

fields.name: Learning Environment and Diversity of Learners
fields.description: Maintains learning environments that are responsive to learner's diversity.

fields.name: Curriculum and Planning
fields.description: Plans and manages the teaching and learning process to meet curriculum requirements.

fields.name: Assessment and Reporting
fields.description: Monitors and evaluates learner progress and achievement.

fields.name: Plus Factor
fields.description: Performs various related activities that contribute to the teaching-learning process.
Applied knowledge of content within and across curriculum teaching areas.
Used a range of teaching strategies that enhance learner achievement in literacy and numeracy skills.
Established safe and secure learning environments to enhance learning through the consistent implementation of policies.
Planned, managed and implemented developmentally sequenced teaching and learning processes.
Performed various related activities that contribute to the teaching-learning process.
